hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.php ]] && [[ -f "$FILE" ]]; then php -l "$FILE" 2>&1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.php ]] && [[ -f "$FILE" ]]; then MATCHES=$(grep -n "\bdd(\|\bdump(\|\bvar_dump(\|\bprint_r(\|Log::debug(" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$MATCHES" ]]; then echo "WARNING: Debug statements found in $FILE:"; echo "$MATCHES"; echo "Remove before committing."; fi; fi'
